title: lankesteria hispida
intro: Lankesteria hispida, also known as the hairy lankesteria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lankesteria hispida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
